# Build an evidence-backed outline

Return `outline.md` from `brief.md`, `research.md`, and `intent.md`.

For every proposed section provide its heading, reader question, intent job,
supported claims and sources, and transition to the next section. Include the
opening promise, the conversion path, and any media/table/example that would
materially improve comprehension. Omit unsupported claims and keyword-driven
sections that do not serve the alignment contract.

Finish with a matrix mapping intent requirements to outline sections and a
source-to-claim coverage check. End with `<!-- COMPLETE -->`.
